description: Run a vetted command on a remote host over SSH (destructive); capture all output to a log.
rules: destructive — executes COMMAND on the remote host; effects are whatever the command does
BatchMode=yes — never prompts; an auth/connect failure fails the step rather than hanging
the private key is an optional *_FILE pointer passed to ssh -i, never an inline secret
dangerous COMMAND literals are still blocked at oversight unless explicitly approved
always writes ssh_output.log (stdout+stderr) even when the command or connection fails
usage: Set SSH_HOST + SSH_USER + COMMAND (and SSH_KEY_FILE for key auth). Output: ssh_output.log.
limitation: Runs a single command non-interactively; no TTY, no agent forwarding, no interactive prompts.
